title: gaillardia aestivalis var. winkleri
intro: Gaillardia aestivalis var. winkleri, also known as the Winkler's blanket flower, is a perennial plant species within the sunflower family (Asteraceae). It has been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, with its medicinal properties attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and flavonoids. The health benefits of Gaillardia aestivalis var. winkleri include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help soothe skin irritations, wounds, and infections. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and potential side effects.
